features: Deeply hydrates brighten & revive your skin.
description: Product Description Brighten your tired-looking skin with our Vitamin C Body Lotion. Packed with antioxidant-rich Vitamin C & moisture-locking Betaine, our light and gentle lotion helps deeply hydrate your body and boosts your natural complexion for a healthy glow. It's time to give your body the TLC it deserves! Ingredients Aqua, Cetearyl Alcohol, Paraffinum Liquidum, Sodium Ascorbyl Phosphate, Betaine, Glyceryl Stearate, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Phenoxyethanol, C13-14 Isoparaffin, Laureth-7, Polyacrylamide, Parfum, Chlorphenesin, Benzyl Salicylate, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene, Linalool.
